name: Managing Refunds/Cancellations of Web Orders
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can manage refunds and cancellations for web orders in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " to handle customer returns and order changes effectively across your omnichannel operations. This capability helps maintain customer satisfaction while protecting revenue by providing proper workflows for processing online order refunds, supporting accurate financial records and inventory adjustments across retail channels."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Managing web order refunds involves understanding platform-specific processes, coordinating between systems, and maintaining accurate financial records. When properly managed, web order refund processes typically lead to improved customer satisfaction through efficient returns handling, accurate financial reporting, and better coordination between online and in-store retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Version Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": eCom API"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When sales are placed online the sale is immediately transferred to Retail Express. However, this is not the case with refunds - no information is transferred. As a result, it's necessary to perform a refund in "}, {"text": "both ", "italic": true}, {"text": "systems separately."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using Shopify? ", "bold": true}, {"text": "View the detailed step-by-step guide for refunding Shopify orders paid through Afterpay or Zip "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Refunds must be processed separately in both systems, online and Retail Express (excluding Shopify refunds via Afterpay or Zip)."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Depending on your business, when refunding your customer you may elect to return the money to the customer or provide them with a voucher/store credit."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin: Vouchers/Credit Notes"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin-vouchers-credit-notes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If providing the customer with a Voucher, you will need to keep in mind the redemption of Retail Express Vouchers is only available through the "}, {"text": "Retail Express Shopify Connector"}, {"text": " (this feature is not supported through the eCommerce API integration)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "<"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Gift Voucher Integration"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For eCommerce API integrations the following alternative options are available:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Online Only vouchers:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Vouchers/credits can be created directly on the web-store as a promotional discount code to be redeemed online only."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When processing the refund in Retail Express use the payment type of "None" to adjust the balance owing to zero, and put in a comment related to the online voucher"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you choose to create a voucher in Retail Express with the same code as the Online Voucher you will need to track when this is used online. Once redeemed you should manually update the voucher in Retail Express so that it doesn't remain outstanding (otherwise it can potentially be used a second time)."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In-store only: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Vouchers/credits can be created directly within Retail Express. The customer will need to be advised they're in-store vouchers only and cannot be redeemed online. This option is covered in detail in Step 2 below."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1 - Process a refund in Retail Express"}], "data-id": "step-1-process-a-refund-in-retail-express"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You will need to first process the refund through Retail Express i.e. Retail Express is the "point of truth" for the order. This is processed using the standard Refund Process, with a few notable differences:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Payment type -", "bold": true}, {"text": " if the payment method used was an integrated payment method (e.g. Afterpay, Zip) you will be prompted to return the funds automatically through the integration using the original transaction reference."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Voucher/credit -", "bold": true}, {"text": " if you want to create a voucher for the customer to use online you will need to ensure that vouchers have been created in line with the online Gift Vouchers process (refer to the "}, {"text": "Shopify - Gift Voucher Integration articles"}, {"text": " for more detail)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "During the refund, you will need to ensure the money is returned to the customer, or voucher/credit if required. For non-integrated payment methods, this may require an additional step to manually return the funds via a merchant portal e.g. eWay."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "<"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Ensure the Payment Type to be used during the refund has been enabled for use at POS e.g. if using the Tyro integration typically individual payment methods of Visa, Mastercard etc are disabled as Tyro automatically updates the Payment Type as part of the integration. Refer to the Payment Types article for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To process a refund of a web order in Retail Express:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open "}, {"text": "POS", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the red "}, {"text": "Returns ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button"}]}, are available to resell and will update the Available quantity, Faulty Stock will be returned to stock as "Faulty", will not update the Available quantity and will not be available to sell)"}]}, The Return Reason Report can be exported to Excel for detailed reporting on your Refunds."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "bold": true}, {"text": "tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose your "}, {"text": "Refund Method", "bold": true}, {"text": ", either by "}, {"text": "Creating a Voucher ", "bold": true}, {"text": "or "}, {"text": "Refunding the Payment", "bold": true}, {"text": " using either of the methods below (if the payment method is an integrated Payment Type there are some additional steps to be completed e.g. Zip, Afterpay or credit cards where Tyro is connected)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, Voucher"}]}], "data-id": "provide-a-voucher"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a voucher in Retail Express:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", 2023-07-08T185207.796.png", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Invoice ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Print Vouchers", "bold": true}, {"text": " to print the voucher for the customer (this can be emailed to the customer manually if preferred)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Finalise", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/133-managing-refunds-cancellations-of-web-orders#web-refund-retail-express-notintegrated", "children": [{"text": "Refund money using a non-integrated Payment Type"}]}], "data-id": "refund-money-using-a-non-integrated-payment-type"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If using a non-integrated Payment Method the Refund can be processed easily directly within POS. To refund the money:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "arrow ", "bold": true}, {"text": "against the payment tender type e.g. CreditCard"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the button again to "}, {"text": "Pay", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppSDbEAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppSDbEAM.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (15).gif", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The negative payment will be added to the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Finalise", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Don't forget to manually refund the money to the customer as required during this step, using your payment merchant facilities if required."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If the Payment Type doesn't appear you will need to configure the Payment Type to be Enabled and available at POS."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/133-managing-refunds-cancellations-of-web-orders#web-refund-retail-express-integrated", "children": [{"text": "Refund money using an integrated Payment Type"}]}], "data-id": "refund-money-using-an-integrated-payment-type"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using Shopify? ", "bold": true}, {"text": "View the detailed step-by-step guide for refunding Shopify orders paid through Afterpay/Zip "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To process the refund:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the arrow for the "}, {"text": "Payment Method", "bold": true}, {"text": " twice to allocate the negative payment"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the prompts to process the return of funds against the original transaction reference"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The payment will be added to the right side of the screen"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTtLEAU.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTtLEAU.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage - 2023-07-08T185223.356.png", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Finalise", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 2 - Process the Refund Online"}], "data-id": "step-2-process-the-refund-online"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By processing the refund online it ensures that both systems are up-to-date. When the customer logs in online they will see the correct purchase history, including refunds."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using Shopify? ", "bold": true}, {"text": "View the detailed step-by-step guide for refunding Shopify orders paid through Afterpay/Zip "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The method you use to process a refund online depends on the eCommerce platform you're using. We have linked to the most common ones below, but for anything further, you will need to direct your enquiry to your vendor."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
